# TONND

> Open-source health dashboard. Connect Fitbit, Renpho, and Hevy to track sleep, weight, workouts, heart rate, HRV, and 15+ metrics in one place.

TONND is an open-source health tracking platform built with FastAPI, React, and PostgreSQL. Users connect their Fitbit wearable, Renpho smart scale, and Hevy workout tracker, and all health metrics appear in a unified dashboard with trends, recovery scores, and interactive muscle heatmaps. The application can be self-hosted using Docker or used as a managed service at tonnd.com. Licensed under AGPL-3.0.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://tonnd.com/): Landing page with features and setup instructions
- [About](https://tonnd.com/about): About the founder and the technology
- [Blog](https://tonnd.com/blog): Articles about health tracking and open-source development
- [GitHub](https://github.com/hemati/tonnd): Source code and documentation

## Tracked Metrics

Fitbit: sleep stages, heart rate, HRV, VO2 Max, SpO2, breathing rate, skin temperature, steps, calories, active zone minutes
Renpho: weight, body fat, muscle mass, BMI, visceral fat, bone mass, BMR, body composition
Hevy: workouts, exercises, sets, reps, volume, primary/secondary muscle groups, muscle heatmap

## Tech Stack

Backend: Python 3.12, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL 16
Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
Infrastructure: Docker Compose
Auth: fastapi-users with JWT and Google OAuth
